name: Artichokes with Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 4 medium California artichokes, prepared and cooked for whole -- artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, and mustard in a small bowl.
2. Gradually add olive oil to the mixture while stirring until well blended.
3. Serve with cooked artichokes.
